title: Set durability and integrity pragmas explicitly
description: Configure foreign_keys, synchronous, and journal pragmas on each connection rather than trusting defaults.
body: Use when opening any SQLite connection. Do not assume defaults are what you want: foreign_keys is OFF by default (constraints silently ignored), and synchronous interacts with WAL for durability. Actions: per connection set PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON to enforce FKs, choose synchronous=NORMAL with WAL (safe against app crashes, fast) or FULL when you must survive OS/power loss, and set busy_timeout and journal_mode. Validation signals include a test that an FK violation is rejected and that the chosen synchronous level survives the crash scenario you care about. Risk boundary: leaving foreign_keys off lets orphaned rows accumulate undetected — a data-integrity finding to flag.
